title: Rice Pudding
excerpt: For Lize Beekman I took ordinary rice pudding and gave it a different flavour. Do give it a try.
html: For Lize Beekman I took ordinary rice pudding and gave it a different flavour. Do give it a try.

items: 1 vanilla pod or 5 ml vanilla extract
slab of chocolate of your choice – can be milk chocolate, dark, light or mixed

steps: Melt the butter in a saucepan and stir-fry the rice until all the grains are glossy.
Add all the rest of the ingredients except the chocolate.
Now you have to stir continuously – it can easily catch and burn.
After 20 minutes it should have a creamy texture. Taste it. The grains shouldn't be mushy.
Take out the vanilla pod, cardamom and cinnamon sticks and throw them away.
Take it off the stove and stir in the chocolate.

directionGroups.title: Syrup
steps: Put 125 g berries (any kind), 100 ml sugar and 100 ml water in a microwave-safe dish.
Microwave for about 5 minutes – stir and mash the berries a little.
Now spoon the rice pudding into a nice dish and spoon the berries on top.
